steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At $x=0$, the house is worth $174{,}000$, so the function must start with $174{,}000$.

steps.title: Convert the percent increase to a multiplier
steps.content: A $2.4\%$ increase means each year the value is multiplied by $$1+0.024=1.024.$$

steps.title: Choose the matching function
steps.content: After $x$ years, the value is $$f(x)=174{,}000(1.024)^x.$$ The model uses the correct growth multiplier. C is correct.
